tactic_proof:
z : nat.
s : nat -> nat.

plus-z : plus z N N.
plus-s : plus (s M) N (s P) <- plus M N P.

goal: plus-comm : plus M N P -> plus N M P -> type.
tactic_proof:
plus-comm-z : plus-comm plus-z D <- plus-zero-right D.
plus-comm-s : plus-comm (plus-s D1) D2 <- plus-comm D1 D3 <- plus-succ-right D3 D2.

goal: plus-assoc : plus A B AB -> plus AB C ABC -> plus B C BC -> plus A BC ABC -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode plus-assoc +D1 +D2 -D3 -D4.

times-z : times z N z.
times-s : times (s M) N P <- times M N Q <- plus N Q P.

leq-z : leq z N.
leq-s : leq (s M) (s N) <- leq M N.

leq-refl-z : leq-refl z leq-z.
leq-refl-s : leq-refl (s N) (leq-s D) <- leq-refl N D.

goal: leq-trans : leq A B -> leq B C -> leq A C -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode leq-trans +D1 +D2 -D3.

max-zl : max z N N.
max-zr : max N z N.
max-ss : max (s M) (s N) (s P) <- max M N P.

goal:
even : nat -> type.
odd : nat -> type.
tactic_proof:
even-z : even z.
even-s : even (s N) <- odd N.
odd-s : odd (s N) <- even N.

arr : tp -> tp -> tp.
unit : tp.

app : tm -> tm -> tm.
lam : tp -> (tm -> tm) -> tm.
empty : tm.

of-app : of (app E1 E2) T <- of E1 (arr T2 T) <- of E2 T2.
of-lam : of (lam T1 E) (arr T1 T2) <- ({x:tm} of x T1 -> of (E x) T2).
of-empty : of empty unit.

value-lam : value (lam T E).
value-empty : value empty.

step-app1 : step (app E1 E2) (app E1' E2) <- step E1 E1'.
step-app2 : step (app V E2) (app V E2') <- value V <- step E2 E2'.
step-beta : step (app (lam T E) V) (E V) <- value V.

goal: preservation : of E T -> step E E' -> of E' T -> type.
tactic_proof:
%mode preservation +Dof +Dstep -Dof'.
preservation-app1 : preservation (of-app D1 D2) (step-app1 S) (of-app D1' D2) <- preservation D1 S D1'.
preservation-beta : preservation (of-app (of-lam D1) D2) (step-beta V) (D1 _ D2).

goal: progress : of E T -> (value E + step E E') -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode progress +Dof -Dresult.

subst-var : subst ([x] x) V V.
subst-const : subst ([x] C) V C.
subst-app : subst ([x] app (E1 x) (E2 x)) V (app E1' E2') <- subst E1 V E1' <- subst E2 V E2'.
subst-lam : subst ([x] lam T ([y] E x y)) V (lam T E') <- ({y:tm} subst ([x] E x y) V (E' y)).

nil : list.
cons : nat -> list -> list.

append-nil : append nil L L.
append-cons : append (cons H T) L (cons H R) <- append T L R.

goal: append-assoc : append L1 L2 L12 -> append L12 L3 L123 -> append L2 L3 L23 -> append L1 L23 L123 -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode append-assoc +D1 +D2 -D3 -D4.

reverse-nil : reverse nil nil.
reverse-cons : reverse (cons H T) R <- reverse T T' <- append T' (cons H nil) R.

length-nil : length nil z.
length-cons : length (cons H T) (s N) <- length T N.

member-head : member X (cons X L).
member-tail : member X (cons Y L) <- member X L.

sorted-nil : sorted nil.
sorted-one : sorted (cons X nil).
sorted-cons : sorted (cons X (cons Y L)) <- leq X Y <- sorted (cons Y L).

insert-nil : insert X nil (cons X nil).
insert-leq : insert X (cons Y L) (cons X (cons Y L)) <- leq X Y.
insert-gt : insert X (cons Y L) (cons Y L') <- insert X L L'.

imp : o -> o -> o.
and : o -> o -> o.
or : o -> o -> o.
not : o -> o.
forall : (i -> o) -> o.
exists : (i -> o) -> o.

imp-i : ({x:pf A} pf B) -> pf (imp A B).
imp-e : pf (imp A B) -> pf A -> pf B.
and-i : pf A -> pf B -> pf (and A B).
and-e1 : pf (and A B) -> pf A.
and-e2 : pf (and A B) -> pf B.
or-i1 : pf A -> pf (or A B).
or-i2 : pf B -> pf (or A B).
or-e : pf (or A B) -> ({x:pf A} pf C) -> ({x:pf B} pf C) -> pf C.
not-i : ({x:pf A} pf false) -> pf (not A).
not-e : pf (not A) -> pf A -> pf false.
forall-i : ({x:i} pf (A x)) -> pf (forall A).
forall-e : pf (forall A) -> {T:i} pf (A T).
exists-i : {T:i} pf (A T) -> pf (exists A).
exists-e : pf (exists A) -> ({x:i} {y:pf (A x)} pf C) -> pf C.

goal: and-comm : pf (imp (and A B) (and B A)).
tactic_proof: and-comm = imp-i ([h:pf (and A B)] and-i (and-e2 h) (and-e1 h)).

goal: or-comm : pf (imp (or A B) (or B A)).
tactic_proof: or-comm = imp-i ([h:pf (or A B)] or-e h ([a] or-i2 a) ([b] or-i1 b)).

goal: mp : pf A -> pf (imp A B) -> pf B.
tactic_proof: mp = [a:pf A] [f:pf (imp A B)] imp-e f a.
dn-intro = imp-i ([a:pf A] not-i ([h:pf (not A)] not-e h a)).

goal: contra : pf (imp (imp A B) (imp (not B) (not A))).
tactic_proof: contra = imp-i ([f:pf (imp A B)] imp-i ([nb:pf (not B)] not-i ([a:pf A] not-e nb (imp-e f a)))).

empty : tree.
node : nat -> tree -> tree -> tree.

insert-empty : insert X empty (node X empty empty).
insert-lt : insert X (node Y L R) (node Y L' R) <- leq X Y <- insert X L L'.
insert-gt : insert X (node Y L R) (node Y L R') <- leq Y X <- insert X R R'.

tree-size-empty : tree-size empty z.
tree-size-node : tree-size (node X L R) (s N) <- tree-size L NL <- tree-size R NR <- plus NL NR N.

tree-height-empty : tree-height empty z.
tree-height-node : tree-height (node X L R) (s H) <- tree-height L HL <- tree-height R HR <- max HL HR H.

tree-member-node : tree-member X (node X L R).
tree-member-left : tree-member X (node Y L R) <- tree-member X L.
tree-member-right : tree-member X (node Y L R) <- tree-member X R.

mirror-empty : mirror empty empty.
mirror-node : mirror (node X L R) (node X R' L') <- mirror L L' <- mirror R R'.

goal: mirror-involutive : mirror T T' -> mirror T' T -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode mirror-involutive +D1 -D2.

inorder-empty : inorder empty nil.
inorder-node : inorder (node X L R) M <- inorder L ML <- inorder R MR <- append ML (cons X MR) M.

subst'-id : subst' ([x] x) V V.
subst'-const : subst' ([x] C) V C.

fresh-const : fresh V ([x] C).
fresh-app : fresh V ([x] app (E1 x) (E2 x)) <- fresh V E1 <- fresh V E2.

alpha-eq-refl : alpha-eq E E.
alpha-eq-lam : alpha-eq (lam T ([x] E x)) (lam T ([y] E y)) <- ({x} alpha-eq (E x) (E x)).
beta-red-step : beta-red (app (lam T E) V) (E V) <- value V.
eta-red-step : eta-red (lam T ([x] app E x)) E.

goal: subst-lemma : subst' E1 V1 E1' -> subst' E2 V2 E2' -> subst' ([x] E1 x) V1 E1'' -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode subst-lemma +D1 +D2 +D3.
new-chan : chan.

unit-msg : msg.
sum-msg : msg -> msg -> msg.

send-proto : msg -> proto -> proto.
recv-proto : msg -> proto -> proto.
end-proto : proto.

dual-end : dual end-proto end-proto.
dual-send : dual (send-proto M P) (recv-proto M Q) <- dual P Q.
dual-recv : dual (recv-proto M P) (send-proto M Q) <- dual P Q.
%mode session-safe +C +P.
linear-new : linear C <- new-chan.

lolli : ltp -> ltp -> ltp.
tensor : ltp -> ltp -> ltp.
with-type : ltp -> ltp -> ltp.
one-type : ltp.

lapp : ltm -> ltm -> ltm.
llam : ltp -> (ltm -> ltm) -> ltm.
pair-ltm : ltm -> ltm -> ltm.
unit-ltm : ltm.

lof-lam : lof (llam T1 E) (lolli T1 T2) <- ({x:ltm} lof x T1 -> lof (E x) T2).
lof-pair : lof (pair-ltm E1 E2) (tensor T1 T2) <- lof E1 T1 <- lof E2 T2.
lof-unit : lof unit-ltm one-type.

goal: linear-safety : lof E T -> step E E' -> lof E' T -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode linear-safety +D1 +D2 -D3.

linear-single-var : linear-single (var X).
linear-single-app : linear-single (lapp E1 E2) <- linear-single E1 <- linear-single E2.

goal: weakening : of E T -> of E T -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode weakening +Dof -Dof'.

goal: type-unique : of E T1 -> of E T2 -> eq T1 T2 -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode type-unique +D1 +D2 -D3.

goal: canonical : value V -> of V T -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode canonical +Dv +Dof.

goal: progress-lemma : of E T -> (value E + step E E') -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode progress-lemma +Dof -Dresult.

goal: preservation-lemma : of E T -> step E E' -> of E' T -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode preservation-lemma +Dof +Dstep -Dof'.
%mode strong-norm +Dof.

goal: confluence : reduces E E1 -> reduces E E2 -> (reduces E1 E' /\ reduces E2 E') -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode confluence +D1 +D2 -D3.

forall-intro : of E (forall-tp A) <- ({X:tp} of E (A X)).
forall-elim : of (tapp E T) (A T) <- of E (forall-tp A).

pack : of (pack T E) (exists-tp A) <- of E (A T).
unpack : of (open E1 [X] [x] E2) C <- of E1 (exists-tp A) <- ({X:tp} {x:tm} of x (A X) -> of (E2 X x) C).
of-tabs : of (tabs K E) (forall-tp A) <- ({X:tp} of (E X) (A X)).
%mode parametricity +D.

sub-refl : sub T T.
sub-trans : sub T1 T3 <- sub T1 T2 <- sub T2 T3.
sub-arrow : sub (arr S1 T1) (arr S2 T2) <- sub S2 S1 <- sub T1 T2.
mk-sig : list -> module-sig.
mk-impl : list -> module-impl Sig.
apply-functor : functor S1 S2 -> module-impl S1 -> module-impl S2 -> type.

pack-abs : tp -> (tp -> tp) -> abs-tp.
open-abs : abs-tp -> (tp -> tp -> tp) -> tp -> type.

goal: struct-eq : module-impl S -> module-impl S -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode struct-eq +M1 +M2.

goal: include : module-impl S1 -> module-impl S2 -> module-impl S3 -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode include +M1 +M2 -M3.

empty-rec : record.
cons-rec : label -> tm -> record -> record.

lab-a : label.
lab-b : label.
lab-c : label.

lookup-head : lookup L (cons-rec L V R) V.
lookup-tail : lookup L (cons-rec L' V R) V' <- lookup L R V'.

goal: update : label -> tm -> record -> record -> type.
tactic_proof:
update-head : update L V (cons-rec L V' R) (cons-rec L V R).
update-tail : update L V (cons-rec L' V' R) (cons-rec L' V' R') <- update L V R R'.

rec-concat-nil : rec-concat empty-rec R R.
rec-concat-cons : rec-concat (cons-rec L V R1) R2 (cons-rec L V R3) <- rec-concat R1 R2 R3.

empty-trace : trace.
step-trace : tm -> tm -> trace -> trace.
%mode trace-step +T +E -E'.

trace-app-nil : trace-append empty-trace T T.
trace-app-cons : trace-append (step-trace E1 E2 T1) T2 (step-trace E1 E2 T3) <- trace-append T1 T2 T3.

eval-refl : evaluates E E.
eval-step : evaluates E E'' <- step E E' <- evaluates E' E''.

multistep-refl : multistep E E empty-trace.
multistep-step : multistep E E'' (step-trace E E' T) <- step E E' <- multistep E' E'' T.

bigstep-val : bigstep V V <- value V.
bigstep-app : bigstep (app E1 E2) V <- bigstep E1 (lam T E) <- bigstep E2 V2 <- bigstep (E V2) V.

goal: bigstep-det : bigstep E V1 -> bigstep E V2 -> eq V1 V2 -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode bigstep-det +D1 +D2 -D3.

goal: bigstep-value : bigstep E V -> value V -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode bigstep-value +D -Dv.

goal: bigstep-of : bigstep E V -> of E T -> of V T -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode bigstep-of +D1 +D2 -D3.

goal: bigstep-smallstep : bigstep E V -> multistep E V _ -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode bigstep-smallstep +D1 -D2.
habs-intro : of (habs E) (arr T1 T2) <- ({x:tm} of x T1 -> of (E x) T2).
happ-intro : of (happ E1 E2) T2 <- of E1 (arr T1 T2) <- of E2 T1.
hstep-beta : hstep (happ (habs E) V) (E V) <- value V.
%mode hsubst +E +V -E'.
%block phabs-block : block {x:tm}.

tok-ident : string -> token.
tok-num : nat -> token.
tok-lparen : token.
tok-rparen : token.
tok-plus : token.
tok-times : token.
%mode parse +Input -Result -Rest.
%mode lex +Input -Tokens.

ast-num : nat -> ast.
ast-var : string -> ast.
ast-bin : op -> ast -> ast -> ast.

op-add : op.
op-sub : op.
op-mul : op.
op-div : op.

gr-term : symbol -> grammar-rule.
gr-alt : grammar-rule -> grammar-rule -> grammar-rule.
gr-seq : grammar-rule -> grammar-rule -> grammar-rule.

init-state : state.
trans-state : state -> char -> state.
%mode accepts +D +S.
%mode nfa-run +N +S -Q.

re-char : char -> regex.
re-concat : regex -> regex -> regex.
re-alt : regex -> regex -> regex.
re-star : regex -> regex.
re-epsilon : regex.
%mode re-match +R +S.

pda-init : pda-state.
pda-push : pda-state -> char -> stack -> pda-state.

io-return : A -> io A.
io-bind : io A -> (A -> io B) -> io B.

state-return : A -> state-m A.
state-bind : state-m A -> (A -> state-m B) -> state-m B.
state-get : state-m state.
state-put : state -> state-m unit.

exc-pure : A -> exc A.
exc-raise : string -> exc A.
exc-catch : exc A -> (string -> exc A) -> exc A.

cont-pure : A -> cont A R.
cont-callcc : ((A -> cont B R) -> cont A R) -> cont A R.

free-pure : A -> free A.
free-op : op-sig -> (result -> free A) -> free A.

goal: add-zero-left : {N:nat} plus z N N -> type.
tactic_proof:
%mode add-zero-left +N -D.
add-zero-left-z : add-zero-left z plus-z.
add-zero-left-s : add-zero-left (s N) plus-z <- add-zero-left N _.

goal: add-zero-right : {N:nat} plus N z N -> type.
tactic_proof:
%mode add-zero-right +N -D.
add-zero-right-z : add-zero-right z plus-z.
add-zero-right-s : add-zero-right (s N) (plus-s D) <- add-zero-right N D.

goal: times-zero-right : {N:nat} times N z z -> type.
tactic_proof: %mode times-zero-right +N -D.

goal: div-mod : nat -> nat -> nat -> nat -> type.
tactic_proof:
div-mod-base : div-mod M N z M <- lt M N.
div-mod-rec : div-mod M N (s Q) R <- leq N M <- sub M N M' <- div-mod M' N Q R.

gcd-zero : gcd M z M.
gcd-rec : gcd M N G <- modulo M N R <- gcd N R G.
